MODULE: cosmos.integration.x_automation.social_poster
FILE: cosmos/integration/x_automation/social_poster.py (236 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Social Poster - Posts updates to both Moltbook and X
Integrates with the evolution loop to announce task completions

CLASSES:
- SocialPoster: Posts updates to Moltbook and X
  Methods: async def post_task_completion(self, agent: str, task_desc: str, task_type: str, code_preview: str='
  Methods: async def post_to_moltbook(self, title: str, content: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def post_to_x(self, content: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def post_progress_update(self, status: dict) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_social_poster() -> SocialPoster
- async def post_task_completion(agent: str, task_desc: str, task_type: str, code_preview: str='')
- async def post_progress_update(status: dict)
